overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt riding a horse through the vineyard countryside of Toussaint, entering a medieval stone village with cobblestone streets, and exiting back to rural paths. The footage features lush summer vegetation, historic European-style architecture, and bright natural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rolling grassland with wildflowers and distant mountains

agents.ego_description: riding horse at a canter through open meadows with swords visible on back

entered.detail: hazy blue mountain range forming the horizon backdrop
lush green grass with red and white wildflowers
rounded green trees dotting the rolling hills
organized rows of grapevines visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide view of rolling Toussaint countryside. The camera follows Geralt on horseback galloping through flowering meadows with distant mountains visible under a partly cloudy sky. Vineyard rows appear in the distance as the horse approaches the cultivated area.

scene_state.functional_zone: vineyard paths between rows of grapevines

events.description: entering structured vineyard area with stone walls and organized grapevine rows

agents.ego_description: navigating horse between narrow vineyard rows on dirt paths

entered.detail: low stone wall bordering the vineyard path
cluster of stone buildings with red roofs visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The horse rides through narrow paths between rows of grapevines in a cultivated vineyard. Stone walls line the left side while the village buildings grow larger in the distance. The ground transitions from grass to packed dirt as the path leads toward the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village street with stone architecture

events.description: transitioning from dirt vineyard path to cobblestone village street
horse slows to walk while navigating village center with fountain and stairs

agents.ego_description: riding through village streets, steering around pedestrians and chickens

notable_agents.action: villager in green tunic standing near stone wall
child in blue clothing walking along the path

entered.detail: traditional stone buildings with dark wooden beams and red tile roofs
tall stone tower with orange-red conical roof
circular stone fountain in the village square
narrow evergreen trees flanking the village entrance

segments.scene_description: The horse enters the medieval village, transitioning from dirt to cobblestone streets. The camera navigates between stone houses with red tile roofs, passing villagers and chickens. The segment features a prominent stone tower and a central fountain with curved stairs, with the horse slowing to navigate the populated square.

events.description: exiting village cobblestone onto dirt country path

agents.ego_description: riding out of village and galloping through countryside paths

notable_agents.action: villager working near a wooden shed with tools

entered.detail: small rustic wooden structure with tools outside
blue water visible in the valley between hills
single-story stone building with tiled roof
large blooming wisteria or lavender bushes

segments.scene_description: The horse exits the village onto dirt country paths, leaving the cobblestone and buildings behind. The scene opens to reveal a distant lake in the valley, with the camera passing a wooden shed and stone cottages. The ride continues through grassy areas with purple flowering bushes and scattered trees, returning to the open countryside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open, rolling meadows of the Toussaint countryside into a medieval village and back out into the rural valley. It begins with Geralt galloping through flowering meadows toward distant mountains, with the landscape gradually shifting as the horse enters narrow paths between rows of cultivated grapevines. As the ground transitions from grass to packed dirt, the camera moves into the heart of a stone village, navigating cobblestone streets lined with red-tiled roofs, a central fountain, and a prominent stone tower. The scene then opens up as the horse exits the settlement, leaving the architecture behind to traverse dirt paths past wooden sheds and stone cottages. Finally, the environment returns to the open countryside, passing purple flowering bushes and scattered trees with a distant lake appearing in the valley.
